summary: iter240 testing completed - 19/19 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Live reservations banner, hour-by-hour drawer with color-coded covers, VIP/returning/glitch/resort/celebration flag chips, concierge alert strip with ACK, standup modal with 4s+scroll gate, and department selector all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter240 adds: (1) GET /api/ecw-ops/reservations/live?outlet_id=X returns total_covers≈67-77, hours[] with color-coded covers by capacity heat-map, reservations[] with flags[] (vip/returning/had-glitch/resort-guest/celebration:X), (2) POST /api/ecw-ops/reservations/upsert creates reservation + emits resv_change_events + triggers capacity broadcast when ≥95% committed, (3) POST /api/ecw-ops/reservations/{id}/cancel sets status cancelled, (4) POST /api/ecw-ops/reservations/seed-demo idempotent seeding (skipped:true on second call), (5) GET /api/ecw-ops/concierge/alerts?active_only=true returns outstanding alerts, (6) POST /api/ecw-ops/concierge/alerts/{id}/ack clears alert, (7) POST /api/ecw-ops/concierge/wire creates property-wire alert. Frontend: [data-testid='resv-banner'] shows total covers at top-right, clickable to open [data-testid='resv-drawer'] with hour rows [data-testid='resv-hour-HHMM'], expandable to show reservations with chips (chip-vip-/chip-returning-/chip-glitch-/chip-resort-/chip-celeb-). [data-testid='concierge-alert-strip'] renders when active alerts exist with ACK button. Standup modal [data-testid='standup-modal'] has 4s countdown + scroll gate, [data-testid='standup-live-reservations'] card inside. Department selector [data-testid='dept-selector'] with dept-btn-culinary/foh/mixology-rd/pastry switches visible tabs. MaestroBQT/index.tsx import fix for @/modules/*Engine paths with .catch() fallbacks is in place.

backend.POST /api/ecw-ops/reservations/upsert: PASS - Creates reservation with confirmed status

frontend.ECW Ops root loads: PASS - data-testid='ecw-ops-root' found after 25s vite transform
frontend.Standup modal on first load: PASS - Shows with 4s countdown + scroll gate
frontend.Standup dismiss button: PASS - Disabled until scroll+wait, then clickable
frontend.Live reservations card in standup: PASS - Shows 77 covers, 17 bookings, 64% capacity with color-coded hour chips
frontend.Reservations drawer: PASS - Opens on banner click, shows 26 hour rows
frontend.Reservation rows with chips: PASS - VIP, Returning, Prior glitch, Celebration chips visible
frontend.Concierge alert strip: PASS - Shows active alerts with ACK button
frontend.Department selector: PASS - All 4 buttons (Culinary, FOH, Mixology R&D, Pastry) present
frontend.Department switching: PASS - FOH shows different tabs (Dash, Standup, Orders, Recipes)
frontend.Standup tab in bottom bar: PASS - Shows standup content with live reservations card
frontend.Bottom tab bar: PASS - Shows appropriate tabs for each department

notes: Frontend initially shows 'Loading full app...' for ~15-20s due to vite first-pass transform on deep module graph. MaestroBQT/index.tsx import fix with .catch() fallbacks is working - no 'Failed to resolve' errors in vite logs after cache clear.
